public_metrics.negative_review_response_note: Company answered 90% of negative reviews, usually within 48 hours.

observations.what_customers_say: Customers value continuity when one person stays responsible across questions and handoffs.
observations.decision_relevance: A clear owner reduces anxiety during a complex project with many steps.

observations.what_customers_say: Customers praise proactive follow-up when it remains professional and does not feel aggressive.
observations.decision_relevance: A useful next step can keep momentum without damaging trust.

observations.what_customers_say: Financially minded customers respond well when assumptions and product choices are explained clearly.
observations.decision_relevance: ROI-oriented buyers need the calculation logic, not only a savings headline.

observations.what_customers_say: Positive reviews often mention explanations that make product and tariff choices understandable.
observations.decision_relevance: Complex energy products need explanation before a customer can confidently sign.

observations.what_customers_say: The public response behavior indicates visible handling of negative feedback.
observations.decision_relevance: Support responsiveness can matter to buyers who worry about what happens after the contract.

observations.what_customers_say: Solar plus storage plus energy products creates a more complex buying decision than a simple PV-only quote.
observations.decision_relevance: Customers may need options broken down by value driver and assumption.

cross_source_notes: Continuity and responsiveness are common positive trust signals across several review surfaces.
Transparent economics matters especially when storage or energy tariffs are included.
caveats: Some reviews may be invited or collected after positive milestones.
Economic praise is qualitative and does not validate any specific payback claim.
